EtiCat 0.3.0.0+72085af4de745e46159c584998cd3bbce60af3bb.72085af4de745e46159c584998cd3bbce60af3bb
Georg Hinkel

  apply        (Default Verb) Applies the version histories

  changelog    Creates changelogs for all modules

  check        Checks whether there is a module history change for all changes
               in the current working tree

  ci           Runs check, apply and pack in sequence

  pack         Packs modules

  providers    Lists the supported providers with their supported module
               parameters

  publish      Publishes all packages that changes since the given baseline

  tag          Calculates a tag name for the current commit

  help         Display more information on a specific command.

  version      Display version information.

  apply        (Default Verb) Applies the version histories

  changelog    Creates changelogs for all modules

  check        Checks whether there is a module history change for all changes
               in the current working tree

  ci           Runs check, apply and pack in sequence

Georg Hinkel

  -p, --prerelease           Sets the prerelease version information

  -n, --build                Sets the build number

  -c, --commit               Sets the commit identifier

  -d, --dry-run              If set, any changes to the file system are omitted

  -w, --working-directory    Sets a different working directory

  -b, --baseline             (Default: origin/main) A commit specifier to
                             specify the baseline commit. If there are no
                             commits since the baseline, the system falls back
                             to the second-last commit

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

options.description: A commit specifier to specify the baseline commit. If there are no commits since the baseline, the system falls back to the second-last commit
Sets the build number
Sets the commit identifier
If set, any changes to the file system are omitted

Sets a different working directory

Sets a different working directory

options.description: A commit specifier to specify the baseline commit. If there are no commits since the baseline, the system falls back to the second-last commit
